commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the doctor legacy-config migration to copy or merge legacy `openai-codex` model context metadata into canonical `openai` model entries, with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +85, Tests +69. Total +154 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main source path resolves OpenAI context lookup through canonical `openai`, while doctor removes `openai-codex` when canonical `openai` exists; the PR body also shows before/after terminal output from the real migration entrypoint.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocker is a narrow mechanical repair to sanitize the new migration copy path and add one regression test.

target.title: fix(doctor): preserve codex context metadata
target.body:
Fixes #90448.

## What changed

- Preserves legacy `openai-codex` model context metadata when the canonical `openai` provider already exists.
- Copies legacy model entries into `models.providers.openai.models` when the canonical provider has no matching model.
- Merges missing `contextWindow`, `contextTokens`, and `maxTokens` fields into matching canonical model entries without overwriting explicit canonical values.
- Adds regression coverage for empty canonical `openai.models`, matching canonical models with missing metadata, and matching canonical models with explicit metadata.

## Real behavior proof

Setup:

- Repository: OpenClaw checkout.
- Branch under test: `fastino-90448-codex-context-fallback`.
- Proof script imports the real `src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.ts` migration entrypoint from each checkout and runs it against a config with canonical `openai.models: []` plus legacy `openai-codex` `gpt-5.5` metadata.

Before, on current main:

```text
node_modules/.bin/tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-90448-proof.ts /Users/allahyar/Documents/fastino-tasks/openclaw
[]
[
  "Removed models.providers.openai-codex because models.providers.openai already exists."
]
```

After, on this branch:

```text
node_modules/.bin/tsx /private/tmp/openclaw-90448-proof.ts /Users/allahyar/Documents/fastino-tasks/openclaw-tui-90448b
[
  {
    "id": "gpt-5.5",
    "name": "GPT-5.5",
    "contextTokens": 272000,
    "maxTokens": 16384,
    "reasoning": false,
    "input": [
      "text"
    ],
    "cost": {
      "input": 0,
      "output": 0,
      "cacheRead": 0,
      "cacheWrite": 0
    },
    "contextWindow": 200000,
    "api": "openai-chatgpt-responses"
  }
]
[
  "Copied models.providers.openai-codex.models[].gpt-5.5 → models.providers.openai.models[].gpt-5.5.",
  "Removed models.providers.openai-codex because models.providers.openai already exists."
]
```

## Verification

```text
git diff --check -- src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrations.runtime.models.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.test.ts
```

No output.

```text
node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/legacy-config-migrate.test.ts

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/allahyar/Documents/fastino-tasks/openclaw-tui-90448b

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  104 passed (104)
   Start at  02:55:17
   Duration  4.50s (transform 280ms, setup 0ms, import 777ms, tests 3.67s, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 7.45s
```

## Platforms tested

- macOS local checkout with Node 26 and repository test runner.

## Limitations

- This validates the doctor migration path directly; it does not run a full installed `openclaw doctor --fix` command.
target.author: sahibzada-allahyar

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
